name: Apricot Burritos
recipeIngredient: 8 oz pkg dried apricots, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dried apricots, water, granulated sugar, brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a large pot.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer, uncovered, for about 10 minutes or until the fruit is tender and the mixture has thickened.
4. Lay out one tortilla on a clean surface.
5. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the apricot mixture onto one edge of the tortilla.
6. Roll up the tortilla tightly, sealing the edges with your hands.
7. Heat oil in a large skillet or pan until hot and shimmering.
8. Carefully place the rolled tortillas into the hot oil and fry for about 1-2 minutes on each side, turning once, until golden brown.
9. Remove from oil using tongs and let drain on paper towels.
10. Serve the burritos hot or at room temperature.
